storyInfo: Helen, Kristen's old secretary, is now Saria's secretary, and she walks into Saria's office anxiously on her first day working for the new Control...

attributes.content: Heave—ho—
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Heave—ho—
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Helen?!
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: I thought you said you might be leaving. Did you come to pack your stuff?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: Yeah, uh, I mean, no. Miss Jara gave me a month of PTO. I thought that was her way of telling me to resign.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Turns out she was retiring.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: She took me out for dinner before she left and said she hoped I would continue to work for Rhine.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: That's great to hear! So the Pantry Alliance lives?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: You know, I kind of wish they’d just fire me.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: ...Wait, today's Saria's first day in her new position, right? Are you still the Control's secretary?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: Yeah. I get back to work after lunch break.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Haha, I see.
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: I guess Miss Jara really trusted you, didn't she?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: No idea.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: All I know is that I could count the total number of times I saw Kristen in the office all these years with my two hands.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: I end up hearing about most things on the news first. The same goes for this changing of the guard. I don't even know what happened...
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Sometimes I can't help but think, am I actually working for Rhine Lab?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Of course you are! You know how many trees there are in the lobby, how many lights there are on the ceiling, how many desks there are on each floor... that's exclusive, insider info!
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: Look, I'm being serious.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Sorry, just a little joke. Anyway, weren't you complaining that you had nothing to do when you were Kristen's secretary?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: You know Saria's reputation as a thing-doer. You won't be bored when you're around her.
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: I also know her reputation for being difficult. Why do you think I'm standing here?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Huh? Oh yeah, this way leads to the Defense Section, doesn't it?
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: Saria wants to use the office of the Defense Section Director as the new Control's office.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Apparently, my first job is to convince the new Control to move her office.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Well, I'll wait for the good news.
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: You're just waiting to laugh at me, aren't you?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Hey, no one's ever won a battle against Saria in the history of Rhine Lab. You'll be famous if you're the first one.
attributes.name: Rhine Staff

attributes.content: Oh, screw you. Guess I'll go now to meet my fate.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Good afternoon, Control. My name is Helen—
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Maylander requests permission to intervene in the investigation on the Hall of Stasis.
attributes.name: Policy Specialist

attributes.content: Have we completed our investigation and recovery efforts?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Yes. All relevant assets have been entered into the database.
attributes.name: Policy Specialist

attributes.content: Then give Maylander the necessary permissions.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Yes, ma'am.
attributes.name: Policy Specialist

attributes.content: Did you need something, Control?
attributes.name: Components Control Section Staff

attributes.content: I've reviewed the ongoing and pending projects in each section. Bring me a detailed report on the marked items, including staffing, revenue, and expenditure.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I've sent you the link.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: All projects associated with Trimounts... I see. I'm on it.
attributes.name: Components Control Section Staff

attributes.content: The quarterly report of the Structural Section is ready, ma'am. We would like to request early approval for additional budgeting of Project Three for the current quarter.
attributes.name: Acting Structural Section Director

attributes.content: I've looked at the request. Looks fine overall. Approved.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Things are quite chaotic following the loss of Director Parvis. We are unable to come up with the funds immediately.
attributes.name: Structural Section Financial Officer

attributes.content: Freeze the assets of Project Two and use it for Project Three.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: But—
attributes.name: Structural Section Financial Officer

attributes.content: I've reviewed the progress reports and data on Project Two. They are unsatisfactory. Inform the director of Project Two that I will be auditing it personally.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Understood.
attributes.name: Structural Section Financial Officer

attributes.content: District officials would like to discuss our pilot qualifications and ongoing experiments in certain fields.
attributes.name: Policy Specialist

attributes.content: Make an appointment for tomorrow. I'll oversee the discussion. Make sure the relevant directors are present, and inform the officials of the time.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Yes, ma'am.
attributes.name: Policy Specialist

attributes.content: (She's dealing with all these requests simultaneously... efficiently, effectively...)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (She doesn't even notice me...)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Oh dear, Helen, what should you do?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (An appointment request from Mr. Justin Jr.?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Remarks... 'a young man with potential'?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: G-Good afternoon, Control. My name is...
attributes.name: Excited Young Man

attributes.content: Justin Jr. mentioned it. Sky Jagger, 'a future star'.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Eh, hehe, he's exaggerating...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Of course. Justin Jr. sees more future stars than there are stars in the night sky over Trimounts.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I understand. I'm not arrogant enough to think I'm more special than anyone else.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: But I promise that I—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Did Justin Jr. tell you about my rules?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: At least he knows the meaning of confidentiality.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Put on your protective gear and gloves.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Saria points towards the boxing ring in a corner of the office.
Huh?!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Huh?!
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: You want Rhine Lab to invest in your passion project? Last three minutes in the ring.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Yes?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: If this is your way of interviewing people, I've got no reason to decline. If you're just being an a-hole, then all the more reason for me to make you realize that you're messing with the wrong guy.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: (God, this guy is completely clueless!)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Saria's toughness is the stuff of legend... why would she...?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Frankly, this is easier.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: For a long time, I eavesdropped on TIT classes by day, and fought hoodlums in the slums by night.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Saria and Sky put on gloves and enter the ring. A fiery bout ensues.
Helen watches on blankly.
A violent clash beyond her comprehension is unfolding in the old office of Rhine Lab's new Control. Is that how she intends to decide the fate of a young man?
Once again, Helen is sure that she never knew Rhine, even after all these years.
(...Fifty-seven seconds.)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (...One minute, thirty-two seconds.)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Stop.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: The boxing stops. Sky is on the floor on one knee, the entire side of his face swollen.
Argh—my face, my shoulder...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You were holding back, weren't you? You hardly broke a sweat.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You lost.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Rhine Lab will not invest in your project.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: ...Because of my educational background?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Your file shows that you completed all coursework for a degree in engineering science, despite never being officially enrolled in the Trimounts Institute of Technology. Not the most scrupulous of methods, but your grades were strong.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: We're fellow alumni, in a sense.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Rhine Lab welcomes everyone who respects science.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Then why?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I read your proposal on the development of impact-resistant aviation materials last night.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: It's an area with great potential. You're sharp, but you lack an adequate grasp of the project's foundation, and many of your ideas are impractical.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Then why not just reject me?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You've got a strong constitution and a chip on your shoulder. You have everything a scientist needs outside of professional skills. What you need now is experience with real research projects and learn how they are built, brick by brick.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Are you interested in joining the Rhine Lab Engineering Section, Sky Jagger?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Lemme guess... Energy?
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Engineering.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Nasti won't like him. Or should I say, they won't like each other.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Nasti might be able to teach him some things.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Satisfied?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: With what, Control?
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: He's underqualified and you know it. I take it you recommended him as a reminder to me.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Hehe. What I didn't tell you is that Sky is a superfan of Kristen's.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: He decided to commit himself to science and join Rhine Lab because he saw the sky that night...
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Then I'm glad he didn't try to earn sympathy points by telling the story.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: That wasn't what caught my attention. Don't you think he's exactly what Rhine needs in this new era?
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Rhine has gone through dramatic changes, and it will continue to face new challenges. We do need talent.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: But I must remind you of one thing.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: There is no new era.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: There are people with knowledge but no formal education in every era. They're the kind of people that science needs.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: But it's only now that they'll get their chance.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: If you don't mind me asking, how do you plan on dealing with Ferdinand?
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: I don't have any plans. He doesn't need me to worry about him.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: If he gets himself out and wants to come back to Rhine, tell him that he needs to get in my ring before he can get back to his desk.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I'll let him wear his power armor, of course.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Heh. I'll tell him.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: (What's she doing...?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (A shower? Now?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: For some reason, Helen feels like a great weight has been lifted off her shoulders the moment Saria walks into the shower room.
She slumps on the sofa.
Helen had worked under Jara for years before joining Rhine Lab. She quickly took to the energy and vitality of Rhine Lab after joining it at Jara's invitation.
She was a hard worker, a workaholic even. She even earned a degree in energy science so that she could work more effectively at Rhine Lab.
Her efforts earned her a promotion to the post of the Control's secretary.
Little did she know that this would be the beginning of a nightmare.
Helen had little opportunity to do actual work under the elusive Kristen. Not only that, from the perspective of someone who at least tried to participate, Helen knows full well—
Kristen was a genius. She fully understood everything that was going on at Rhine Lab; she just didn't care about most of it.
The thought tormented Helen. She found it hard to accept that the leader of the company that she loved so much did not love what she had created.
(Anyone else would have perceived Saria's attitude as being the polar opposite of Kristen's.)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Somehow, I have a feeling that they're very alike in a way...)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Wait, Saria just turned down all upcoming appointment requests on her terminal and pushed back all meeting requests and document reviews by one hour?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Is she taking a break?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: She sees Saria walk to the other side of the ring, where there is a window and a table, with a shelf next to them that has various potted plants lying on it.
Saria takes out an empty pot from the shelf and lays it on the table.
Helen is surprised to see something 'grow' beneath Saria's palm from the black gravel.
A 'shoot', so delicate it seems to be crafted from jade, rises from the dirt, followed by a second, and a third...
They grew upwards rapidly, intertwining with each other, as though a great sculptor is creating life out of a rock with the chisel of time.
The white plant-like frame is completed in a few minutes, standing quietly in the pot, approximately thirty centimeters tall.
Its branches are stark and strong, but it is composed of a jade-like calcareous substance with a delicate, tree-ring-like texture on the surface.
(Did she just create a 'tree' with her powers?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: (Are the other 'plants' her works too?)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: It seems the office has suddenly fallen silent.
Of course, the office has not been particularly noisy since she came in at noon.
Now, though, it feels as if there is something in the air preventing her from speaking.
It is a familiar feeling.
She once shadowed Kristen, hoping to find out what the Control is doing when she is out of office.
She found out that Kristen had gone to the rooftop of the Rhine Lab HQ building, staring at the sky for two full hours.
Right now, Saria gives Helen the same feeling that Kristen once did.
Though they had what some might say were the greatest things on Terra, it is only in this moment that they truly belong to themselves.
Fascinating, isn't it?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: We were surprised when we learned about Saria's hobby of making these calcified plants.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: ...Director Franks? When did you—
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Shh, don't disturb Saria.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Oh, okay. Why did you...
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: You used to be Kristen's secretary, right?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: I came to calibrate the equipment for her before I leave. You should learn to do it; it could come in handy.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Okay.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: The fitness corner and shower were designed by Nasti, at Saria's request.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Saria hasn't been back to this office in a while. Fortunately, all the data collection was done on Rhodes Island, which saves some effort.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Wait, did you say... leave?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Oh, it's not what you think.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: I'm going on a business trip to the frontiers for a while, so I wanted to get certain things out of the way before I go.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: What's on your mind?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: ...I know Kristen wasn't as indifferent as people outside thought she was.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Saria's work attitude is the polar opposite of Kristen's, but I feel like I see the same thing in both of them...
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Their work, or should I say Rhine Lab, is not actually that important to them.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: ...Very astute.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: What exactly is Rhine Lab to them?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: ...I'm sorry, I shouldn't have asked.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: There was a meeting of section directors in the aftermath of the Galleria Stellaria incident. At the meeting, Saria said—
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: 'Kristen is not the embodiment of greatness. She is a flawed human being, just like the rest of us.'
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: 'But she opened a door, and the light of greatness shines from beyond the door.'
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Why shouldn't 'greatness' be the ideal?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Because an ideal is a dream that can save everyone, while 'greatness' is not. It is cold and hard, often oppressive.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: But it's the fate of a scientist to be drawn by such a light, and Saria is no exception.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: What were you drawn to, Helen?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Helen looks up.
The sun shines through the window on Saria, who is fully focused on her plant, as though there is nothing that can disturb her.
The scene is a strange one, yet somehow holy at the same time.
I hate to admit it... but I guess it's not the light that I was drawn to, but the people who were drawn to the light.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Is that not enough?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: I suppose it is.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Phew...
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Saria, I've calibrated your equipment based on the Rhodes Island figures.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Thanks.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: The paperwork is in order. Just consider it an extended business trip. Anything you need, Rhine can provide.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: No problem. The Site 359 matter is settled, and I've resumed work in the Originium Art Section.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: You know it doesn't really matter to me where I do my experiments.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Oh, and Muelsyse stopped me in the corridors with tears on her face. She complained that she's been doing too many goodbyes lately, and insisted on seeing me off personally.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: She's been touchy lately.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: A bit of sentimentality isn't a bad thing in times like these.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: That's not something I would expect you to say.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Don't you know? I've always been a sentimental girl.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: It's true that I don't know you that well.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Of all the directors, we've worked with each other the least.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: That will change.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: How are you planning to change Rhine Lab, Saria?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: I'm not the one changing it. It will change of its own, in whatever way it chooses. My job is just to keep it going.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: You know, maybe I was wrong about you.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I thought you saw freedom as Kristen's special privilege. But the truth is, you allow everyone other than yourself to have freedom, don't you?
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: I'm not that great.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Neither was Kristen.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Bye, Saria. This time, you'll have all my experiment data.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Good. See you.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Oh, and I think your secretary has some questions. Don't forget about her.
attributes.name: Dorothy

attributes.content: Uh, pay no mind to what Director Franks said, I don't actually have anything to ask...
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: I don't suppose you even know my name...
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Helen. I remember.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Mm—huh?
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: You were with Kristen when she came to find me a few years ago.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Jara told me about you too. She believes you're up to the job of supporting me.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: But I haven't been able to help at all...
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: I could deal with today's things on my own. But I've been away from Rhine Lab for a while, and there are many things about Rhine that I don't know as well as you do. I'll be counting on you.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: (...I'm sorry, Saria, but from what I saw today, I can't imagine the day that you'll be counting on me!)
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: It'll be an honor to work for you!
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: What was it that you wanted to ask?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Well... I had a question, but it's not important now.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: I was going to ask why you want to keep using this office, instead of moving into the Control's office.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: You found the answer?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I thought maybe you were honoring Kristen.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Or maybe you wanted to make it clear to others that you're going to do things differently from Kristen.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: But now, I suspect it's not so complicated after all.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Correct.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I didn't want to move my office because everything in this office was tailor made for me.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I'm not used to Kristen's office, and I'm not as comfortable there. It's that simple.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Yeah... I don't suppose there's another office in Rhine Lab with a boxing ring and shower.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary

attributes.content: Break's over. Let's get to work.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Yes, ma'am.
attributes.name: Helen the Secretary
